---
title: "REadme"
author: "Vishali Sairam"
date: "20/01/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
## Hi

Hi my name is Vishali and I am a public policy student and a DAAD scholar at the Hertie School in Berlin. I previously graduated with an Integrated Masters in Development studies from IIT Madras.
